channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Beauty of American patriotism on display even as USA loses OT heartbreaker to Canada in 4 Nations championship
item.description: Team Canada may have won the 4 Nations title on Thursday night but it was American patriotism that was on full display during the championship game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Connor McDavid scored at 8:18 of overtime in the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game to give Canada a 3-2 victory over the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game changed a lyric in “O Canada” from “in all of us command” to “that only us command.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Milwaukee's Bobby Portis suspended after he mistakenly took painkiller Tramadol rather than Toradol
item.description: The NBA suspended Milwaukee forward Bobby Portis Jr. for 25 games without pay on Thursday because he tested positive for the painkiller Tramadol, a violation of the league's anti-drug program.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods joins another White House meeting as PGA Tour moves closer to Saudi deal
item.description: Tiger Woods joined PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan and player director Adam Scott in a second White House meeting Thursday with President Donald Trump, another sign the sport is moving rapidly toward ending the division brought on by Saudi-funded LIV Golf.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ja Morant has no comment on report that says group targeting pro athletes burglarized his home
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Two-time NBA All-Star Ja Morant is not talking about a published report that says he is the Memphis player whose home was burglarized by the seven men from Chile charged in federal court with orchestrating break-ins at the homes of prominent athletes around the country.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kristin Juszczyk and Kylie Kelce try to embrace being called WAGs
item.description: On her podcast, Kylie Kelce talks to Kristin Juszczyk about the negative connotations of an early 2000s British term that became popular again after Taylor Swift began dating Travis Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Anthony Davis out at least 2 more weeks, but Mavs say he's making good progress with groin injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis will be sidelined at least two more weeks with the groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut, while the Mavericks said Thursday their star forward is making good progress in his recovery.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Utah State blasts San Jose State, 105-57
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team got back on track following Sunday's heartbreaking loss to New Mexico with a resounding beatdown over San Jose State Wednesday night, 105-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9

item.title: Northwestern golfers invited to Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Northwestern is going to be well-represented at the 6th Annual Augusta National Women's Amateur Championship. Lauryn Nguyen and Elise Lee are set to the make the trip to Georgia along with NU commit Arianna Lau. "It's such a special place," noted Nguyen.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Liverpool continues Premier League title charge and Man United's season keeps getting worse
item.description: Liverpool continued its charge toward the Premier League title on Sunday with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton. For Manchester United, it just keeps getting worse after a 1-0 loss at Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: NASCAR disqualifies Kligerman for too-low truck after flag-planting win at Daytona. He is appealing
item.description: Full-time television analyst and part-time NASCAR driver Parker Kligerman claimed the checkered flag for the Truck Series season opener and promptly planted it in the grass by the Daytona International Speedway logo.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Suzuki and Counsell are working on their communication in spring training with the Cubs
item.description: MESA, Ariz. (AP) — Seiya Suzuki is working on his communication with Craig Counsell, and the manager says it's his fault. Suzuki joined the rest of the Chicago Cubs for their first full-squad workout of spring training on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
